name: Pan-Fried Bass
recipeIngredient: 4 Bass, cleaned, head and tails removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe the fish with a cloth dipped in lightly salted water.
2. Rub the fish lightly with bacon drippings and roll in corn meal.
3. Dust a little salt and pepper in the cavities.
4. Heat bacon drippings in a cast iron fry pan until drippings are 1/4 - 1/2 inch deep and hot enough to brown a 1 inch cube of bread in 2 minutes (no hotter).
5. Cook fish until it is browned on one side, about 4 minutes.
6. Turn the fish over and cook until browned on the other side.
7. Drain on paper towel before serving.
